title: Copper Edges Lower as Traders Await Return of China Demand
description: Copper edged lower as investors waited for demand from industrial users in top buyer China to rebound after the Lunar New Year break.
content: Copper edged lower as investors waited for demand from industrial users in top buyer China to rebound after the Lunar New Year break.
